title: stelis secunda
intro: Stelis secunda is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is known for its small size and delicate white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the roots of Stelis secunda are often used in teas or infusions to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
